source.reference: .30 Carbine M1 Ball 110gr FMJ. G7 BC~0.146. US carbine round WWII. Velocity ~607 m/s (18" barrel). Intermediate pistol-class pressure.
source.methodology: BC values estimated from typical projectile form factor for this caliber and weight.

notes: Chamber pressure: 345 MPa (~50,000 PSI). .30 Carbine (7.62x33mm) rimless straight-walled intermediate cartridge.
